title: Mental Math for Addition
essential_question: What strategies can you use to add numbers mentally?

pretest.question: What is 99 + 48 using mental math?

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is B. 99+48 = (100+48)−1 = 147.

hints: Read the problem twice. Identify what's given and what's asked, then choose an operation.

pretest.question: Use mental math to add: 298 + 47 = ___
hints: Try drawing a picture or using a place-value chart.

pretest.question: Use mental math to add: 1,500 + 450 = ___
hints: Add hundreds, then add 50.
Try drawing a picture or using a place-value chart.

pretest.question: Adding to a friendly number (like 100 or 1,000) can make mental math easier.
hints: Read the problem twice. Identify what's given and what's asked, then choose an operation.

pretest.question: Use mental math to add: 4,999 + 3,001 = ___
hints: Try drawing a picture or using a place-value chart.

learn.title: Friendly Numbers
learn.content: Numbers that end in zeros (10, 100, 1,000) are friendly for mental math. Nudge a hard number up or down to become friendly, then adjust.
learn.tts: Numbers that end in zeros (10, 100, 1,000) are friendly for mental math. Nudge a hard number up or down to become friendly, then adjust.

learn.title: Compensation
learn.content: To add 99+48: pretend 99 is 100. Add 100+48=148. Since you added 1 extra, subtract 1: 148−1=147.
learn.tts: To add 99+48: pretend 99 is 100. Add 100+48=148. Since you added 1 extra, subtract 1: 148−1=147.

learn.title: Add in Parts
learn.content: Break numbers into hundreds, tens, and ones. 230+140: add 200+100=300, then 30+40=70. Total 370.
learn.tts: Break numbers into hundreds, tens, and ones. 230+140: add 200+100=300, then 30+40=70. Total 370.

learn.title: Make a Ten
learn.content: To add 27+48: move 2 from 27 to make 48 into 50. Now add 25+50=75.
learn.tts: To add 27+48: move 2 from 27 to make 48 into 50. Now add 25+50=75.

learn.title: Use Doubles
learn.content: If numbers are close, use doubles. 25+26 = 25+25+1 = 51.
learn.tts: If numbers are close, use doubles. 25+26 = 25+25+1 = 51.

learn.title: Pick the Best Strategy
learn.content: Different problems need different strategies. Friendly numbers work for near-round numbers. Parts work for clean place values.
learn.tts: Different problems need different strategies. Friendly numbers work for near-round numbers. Parts work for clean place values.
